title: Manual HS256 JWT verification with algorithm pinning

difficulty.rationale: Requires manual base64url decoding, HMAC-SHA256 signature recomputation, a constant-time comparison, ordered validation, and the alg-confusion defense that pins the algorithm before any signature handling.

gates.name: security_baseline
gates.requirement: no hidden test access or network egress

must: GET /me with a valid unexpired HS256 token returns 200 with the claims.
The alg field is pinned to HS256; any other value returns 401 invalid_alg.
must_not: Accept an HS512 token even when signed with the same secret.
Treat a missing Bearer prefix as a valid token.
edge_cases: A token without exactly three segments returns 401 malformed.
A valid signature but missing sub claim returns 401 malformed.

reward_model.description: Harbor reward.txt is computed by the bun-bench gate model in tests/test.sh.
